name: ferry-sf
description: Ferry — a live, change-set-style Salesforce metadata migrator (org → org): browse a source org, select components, deploy/validate to a target with full test-level control.

scripts.test: node test/store.test.mjs && node test/session.test.mjs && node test/prefs.test.mjs && node test/history.test.mjs && node test/orgflow.test.mjs && node test/manifest.test.mjs && node test/metadata.test.mjs && node test/import.test.mjs && node test/status.test.mjs && node test/tui-smoke.mjs && node test/tui-guards.test.mjs && node test/tui-cursor.test.mjs && node test/tui-typeahead.test.mjs && node test/tui-sessions.test.mjs && node test/tui-targetwrap.test.mjs && node test/tui-toggle.test.mjs && node test/tui-help.test.mjs && node test/tui-confirm.test.mjs && node test/tui-splash.test.mjs && node test/tui-runtests.test.mjs && node test/tui-basket.test.mjs && node test/tui-visual.test.mjs && node test/tui-savequit.test.mjs && node test/tui-namedsave.test.mjs && node test/tui-testlevel.test.mjs && node test/tui-sticky.test.mjs && node test/tui-preview.test.mjs && node test/tui-perf.test.mjs && node test/startup.test.mjs
